summary: Visualises the universe and channel layout produced by DMX Fixture POPs as a tabular map. Helps validate addressing, spot collisions, and document a rig.

key_params.name: source
key_params.note: Path to a DMX Fixture POP or DMX Out POP

common_gotchas: Read-only — does not transmit DMX. Pair it with the DMX Out POP for actual output.
Channel collisions show up as duplicate cells — fix in the upstream Fixture POP's address/gap parameters.
